Trajectories and other input/output files of Molecular Dynamics Simulations of DPPS lipidic bilayers with salted water (0.25M NaCl) and hydration Number=18

Trajectories and other input/output files of Molecular Dynamics Simulations of  DPPS lipidic bilayers with salted water (0.25M NaCl) and hydration Number=18
Force Field = CHARMM36 and mTIP3P
Composition :   200 DPPS, 3600 water, 208 Na+, 08 Cl- 
Simulation time : 1000 ns
Temperatures : 333.15, 338.15, 343.15, 348.15 and 353.15 K
Pressure  : 1 Bar, no surface tension, semi-isotropic barostat
time lag between conformations in the trajectory : 0.1 ns
